description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property features a private backyard with a swimming pool, surrounded by a low hedge and a wooden privacy fence. There is a spacious outdoor patio area, partially covered, with seating and a dining space, as well as a small garden section. The house includes a balcony with a metal railing, and the main entryway is understated, blending seamlessly into the minimalist facade. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white house with large windows, a backyard pool, patio, and balcony, surrounded by a hedge and wooden fence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat roof, balcony with metal railing, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and wooden deck.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, garden hedge, wooden fence, and the open patio area adjacent to the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the pool, wooden privacy fence, and the house's clean, white facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway, large balcony, and the minimalist, geometric design of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flush door, no steps, and a seamless integration into the facade
